query:
SELECT 
  university_name, 
  major_name, 
  COUNT(*) as project_count,
  MIN(scraped_at) as first_scraped,
  MAX(expires_at) as latest_expiry
FROM scraped_projects 
WHERE expires_at > NOW()
GROUP BY university_name, major_name
ORDER BY project_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT 
  university_name, 
  major_name, 
  COUNT(*) as project_count,
  MIN(scraped_at) as first_scraped,
  MAX(expires_at) as latest_expiry
FROM scraped_projects 
WHERE expires_at > NOW()
GROUP BY university_name, major_name
ORDER BY project_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
